mapper.select: SELECT id, operator_code, operator_name, alias_name, country, region, network_type, status, created_time, updated_time FROM operator_info ORDER BY id
SELECT id, operator_code, operator_name, alias_name, country, region, network_type, status, created_time, updated_time FROM operator_info WHERE country = #{country} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, operator_code, operator_name, alias_name, country, region, network_type, status, created_time, updated_time FROM operator_info WHERE region = #{region} ORDER BY id

SELECT id, operator_code, operator_name, alias_name, country, region, network_type, status, created_time, updated_time FROM operator_info WHERE operator_name LIKE '%' || #{operatorName} || '%' ORDER BY id
